tool.name: ssl_certificate_analyzer
tool.description: Analyze SSL/TLS certificates for security issues.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Full certificate analysis with security checks - Get certificate chain information - Check supported cipher suites - Detect expired or expiring certificates - Identify weak protocols and ciphers

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The analysis action to perform: - analyze: Full certificate analysis with security check - chain: Get certificate chain information - ciphers: Check supported cipher suites

returns.description: Certificate details, security analysis, and recommendations

tool.examples:
# Full certificate analysis
analyze example.com
# Get certificate chain
chain example.com
# Check ciphers
ciphers example.com 443
